reviews.comment:
Buena atención, lo malo es que no despachan al medio día recién a las 14:00 hora despachan de vuelta , si llegas al medio día tenes que esperar hasta las 14:00 para que te despachan, tiene que mejorar esa parte el servicio, agregar un personal que despache para no esperar 2 hora para que te despachan.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, the problem is that they don't process orders at midday; they only process them again at 2:00 PM. If you arrive at midday, you have to wait until 2:00 PM to be served. They need to improve that aspect of the service and add staff to process orders so you don't have to wait two hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEOWVMSVl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños del recreo del ACA están limpios y tienen papel y jabón. El pasto esta corto. Se respeta el no poner música y se puede disfrutar de la paz del lugar. En la proveeduría hay hasta bicicletas y pelotas para alquilar. Solo recomiendo llevar sillas porque el sol se va corriendo de lugar pese a que hay muchos árboles.
La estación de servicio tiene una excelente atención, incluso la renovaron hace poco.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms at the ACA recreation area are clean and have toilet paper and soap. The grass is short. The no-music rule is respected, allowing you to enjoy the peace and quiet. The general store even has bicycles and balls for rent. I recommend bringing chairs because the sun moves across the sky despite the many trees.
The gas station has excellent service and was recently renovated.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0NVlDRkRREAE
